result.security_review: {"findings":[{"id":"SEC-001","severity":"critical","title":"SQL Injection","description":"User input is directly interpolated into SQL query string.","cwe":"CWE-89","owasp":"A03:2021 Injection","line_range":"11","remediation":"Use parameterized queries: cursor.execute('SELECT * FROM users WHERE name = ?', (username,))"},{"id":"SEC-002","severity":"critical","title":"Plaintext Password Storage","description":"Passwords are written to a plaintext file without hashing.","cwe":"CWE-256","owasp":"A02:2021 Cryptographic Failures","line_range":"22-23","remediation":"Use bcrypt or argon2 for password hashing before storage."}],"summary":"Two critical vulnerabilities found. Code requires immediate remediation.","secure_practices":[]}
